personalInfo.title: Fullstack Developer
personalInfo.tagline: Turning Figma designs into pixel-perfect interfaces and building robust backends — 5 years crafting web and mobile experiences.
bio: Fullstack Developer with 5 years of experience specializing in modern web and mobile application development. Proficient in the JavaScript ecosystem — React, Next.js, Node.js, TypeScript — and experienced with Python for backend services. Passionate about translating designs into high-quality, pixel-perfect and accessible UIs.
Strong collaborator in Agile/Kanban environments, focused on consistent delivery, performance optimization and long-term code stability. Currently open to remote opportunities.

vagas-pederneiras.title: Vagas Pederneiras
vagas-pederneiras.description: Job board platform connecting talent to companies in Pederneiras and the region.
vagas-pederneiras.longDescription: Full-stack job board with vacancy listings, search, company profiles, and candidate management — built for the local job market in Pederneiras, SP.

leaderboard-pokemon-tcg.title: Pokémon TCG Leaderboard
leaderboard-pokemon-tcg.description: Full-stack championship management platform for Pokémon TCG with rankings, match tracking, and admin panel.
leaderboard-pokemon-tcg.longDescription: Full-stack app with public rankings, championship management, player registration, and V/W/L match scoring. Frontend with React + Vite + TailwindCSS + Zustand, backend with Express + Prisma + PostgreSQL + JWT.

eletrobus.title: EletroBus
eletrobus.description: Real-time urban bus tracking app built as a college thesis — GPS tracking, Google Maps, and social login.
eletrobus.longDescription: TCC project focused on improving urban mobility with real-time bus tracking, route and stop data, social login via Google, and a driver interface. Built with React Native, Expo, and MongoDB.

pokedex-react.title: Pokédex App
pokedex-react.description: Complete Pokédex built with Next.js consuming the PokéAPI, featuring all Pokémon including alternative forms.

nearby.title: Nearby
nearby.description: Location-based mobile app to discover nearby clubs and establishments, built during NLW Rocketseat.

nlw-agents.title: NLW Agents
nlw-agents.description: AI agents application built during NLW Rocketseat, using Node.js and modern AI tooling.

letry.title: Letry
letry.description: Animated digital LED sign generator with shareable URL — customizable text, animation, colors and speed.

kura.title: Kura
kura.description: Browser extension to save links, texts and notes with tags, comments and reading list — local, fast and no account needed.

portfolio.title: This Portfolio
portfolio.description: Personal portfolio built with React, TypeScript and TailwindCSS with a Dark Minimal theme.

exp-1.description: Maintained and scaled a sales management platform, implementing performance optimizations and integrating new features to enhance sales efficiency.
highlights: Reduced load times by 40% through performance optimizations
Integrated AI and Geolocation features to enhance sales route efficiency
Resolved critical production bottlenecks improving system stability and response times

exp-2.description: Engineered and shipped high-impact features for a specialized web application, working closely with UI/UX teams and driving consistent product delivery in an Agile environment.
highlights: Built SEO-optimized front-end with Next.js and robust backend services with Python
Translated Figma designs into pixel-perfect, responsive and accessible UIs
Actively contributed to Kanban workflows and sprint planning

exp-3.description: Developed and maintained features for a sales-oriented web application, leading legacy code refactoring efforts to improve scalability and reduce bugs.
highlights: Refactored legacy code increasing system efficiency by 30% and reducing critical bugs by 40%
Developed new features significantly enhancing user experience and system performance
Updated and standardized libraries across the platform ensuring long-term stability
